---
title: "Assistant Professor Recruitment 2020 (Archived)"
subtitle: "The West Bengal College Service Commission (WBCSC)"
date: "2020-12-31"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-page}

## 🏛️ Recruitment Announcement: Assistant Professor 2020

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This is an **archived recruitment notice**. The application period for this advertisement has ended.

The **West Bengal College Service Commission (WBCSC)** released **Advertisement Number 1/2020** for the recruitment of Assistant Professors in **State-Aided Degree Colleges of West Bengal**.

### 📅 Important Dates

| Event | Date |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Commencement of ONLINE Application** | December 31, 2020 |
| **Last date of ONLINE Application** | February 15, 2021 |

### 📋 Key Details

*   **Advertisement Number:** 1/2020
*   **Organization:** West Bengal College Service Commission (WBCSC)
*   **Post:** Assistant Professor
*   **Location:** State-Aided Degree Colleges across West Bengal

### 📄 Download Official Circular

You can view or download the full official advertisement below for reference:

[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download Advertisement (PDF)](../jobs/wbcsc_asst_prof_2020.pdf){.social-btn style="background: #ef4444; color: white; border: none; font-weight: 600;"}

<br>

<hr>

[<i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to All Jobs](../jobs.qmd){.social-btn}

:::
